name: Homemade Salsa
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Ripe, red tomatoes, peeled and chopped
6 to 8 Jalapeno chiles, cored and seeded, minced
1 tbsp to 2 tbsp New Mexican red chili powder
recipeInstructions:
Combine the fresh tomatoes, red and green onions, garlic, and vinegar in a 5-quart sauté pan. Simmer for 10 minutes to reduce some of the tomato liquid. Add the chiles, chili powder, cumin, oregano, salt, and additional crushed tomatoes. Simmer for another 10 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in the cilantro.
Store in a glass jar in the refrigerator or freeze in 1-cup batches. Makes about 1 quart.
